allow: Bash(for dir in analytics customers delivery-zones inventory orders products)
Bash(mv page.tsx analytics customers delivery-zones inventory orders products admin/)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\(''dependencies'',{}\), **d.get\(''devDependencies'',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if ''tailwind'' in k or ''postcss'' in k]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''version:'', d.get\(''version''\)\); print\(''exports keys:'', list\(d.get\(''exports'',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:10]\)")
